title: Stegostyla testacea
intro: Stegostyla testacea, also known as the "golden thread tree" or "golden rattan," is a climbing palm plant native to tropical Asia. The health benefits of Stegostyla testacea include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, saponins, and other phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Stegostyla testacea are tea, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.

side_effects: Stegostyla testacea, also known as the golden trumpet vine, contains toxic compounds that can cause adverse reactions in some individuals. Handling the plant's sap can lead to skin irritation and allergic reactions.
